version header.description: DRU file version header. Required as the first form in every .kicad_dru file.

rule (minimal).description: Minimal rule with a name and one constraint.

rule with condition.description: Rule with a condition string and a single constraint.

clearance constraint.description: Electrical clearance between copper objects on different nets.

clearance by netclass.description: Clearance for nets in a specific net class. Pattern from KiCad docs §HV example.

track_width constraint.description: Track / arc-segment width. opt is the interactive router default.

via_diameter constraint.description: Outer diameter of via pad. Available KiCad 7+.

hole_size constraint.description: Drill diameter. min ↔ minor axis, max ↔ major axis on oval slots.

hole_to_hole constraint.description: Mechanically drilled holes only. Excludes laser/microvia and milled slots.

edge_clearance constraint.description: Clearance to anything on Edge.Cuts plus oval pad holes.

courtyard_clearance constraint.description: Spacing between footprint courtyards. min < 0 allows overlap.

length constraint (min/max).description: Net total routed length. Length values; time-domain units (fs/ps) supported on master.

skew constraint.description: Length-skew across matched nets. Add (within_diff_pairs) to scope per pair.

skew within diff pairs.description: Skew evaluated within each diff pair rather than across the whole match set.

diff_pair_gap.description: Gap between parallel diff-pair tracks. opt is the interactive router default.

diff_pair_uncoupled.description: Maximum length a diff pair may run uncoupled.

via_count constraint.description: Max vias per matching net. min added in v8.

annular_width constraint.description: Annular ring around vias and pads (pads added in v8).

thermal_relief_gap.description: Gap between pad and zone for thermal-relief connections.

min_resolved_spokes.description: Minimum number of thermal-relief spokes that must actually be drawn (0–4).

physical_clearance.description: Non-net-aware clearance between copper, paste, silk, mask, courtyard, edge.

physical_hole_clearance.description: Drilling tolerance: round holes vs anything regardless of net.

creepage.description: Surface-distance creepage between different-net copper. KiCad 9+.

track_angle.description: Bend angle between adjacent track segments, bare number in degrees (track_angle is unit-less in the parser; suffixing `deg` produces a parse error). KiCad 9+.

connection_width.description: Minimum width of copper connection between a pad and a zone fill. KiCad 7+.

solder_mask_expansion.description: Solder-mask expansion around pads / shapes / tracks. KiCad 10+ (master-only on KiCad 9).

solder_mask_sliver.description: Minimum solder-mask sliver width between copper items. KiCad 10+ (master-only on KiCad 9).

solder_paste_abs_margin.description: Absolute solder-paste margin for pads (length; usually negative to inset). KiCad 10+ (master-only on KiCad 9).

solder_paste_rel_margin.description: Relative solder-paste margin for pads (unitless ratio, no unit suffix; usually negative). KiCad 10+ (master-only on KiCad 9).

via_dangling.description: Flag vias that are unconnected or connected on only one layer. Takes no value. KiCad 10+ (master-only on KiCad 9).

bridged_mask.description: Flag solder-mask bridges between copper items. Takes no value. KiCad 10+ (master-only on KiCad 9).

disallow constraint.description: Forbid the listed object type(s) where the condition matches.

disallow keepout (track via zone).description: Copper keepout pattern from KiCad docs.

assertion constraint.description: DRC violation if the assertion expression evaluates to false.

condition (NetClass equality).description: Match objects in the named net class.

condition (intersectsArea).description: Match objects overlapping the named rule area / zone.

condition (fromTo).description: Match the signal path between named pads. RefDes-Pin form, wildcards allowed.

condition (intersectsCourtyard).description: Match objects overlapping a footprint's courtyard.

condition (Type equality).description: Match objects of a specific Type.

layer clause.description: Restrict the rule to a single layer or a layer-set shortcut.

severity.description: Override DRC reporting severity for this rule's violations.
